purpose: Rules for selecting dynamic character memory files for scene_contract.
load_full_character_memory_when: character is nearby and can observe/hear the scene
character is speaking or being directly addressed
character is directly referenced by current scene goal
character must receive a state update because they witnessed/learned something
calendar current day explicitly makes this character active
do_not_load_full_character_memory_when: character is absent and only generally exists in canon
character is a future calendar event not yet active
character is not relevant to scene goal
only Akira POV is active and this character is not present/referenced
knowledge_safety: Loaded memory is internal for characterization, not automatic POV exposition.
If a character is not loaded, they do not learn the scene.
Do not use unloaded character memory to drive current NPC behavior.
Do not use calendar/rules as character knowledge.

recommended_scene_contract_slice.protected_moments: only active moments relevant to current scene
